# spec-superflow

## Overview
spec-superflow is a self-contained workflow integration plugin for Claude Code and Trae. It merges spec-driven planning artifacts (proposal, specs, design, tasks) with disciplined execution guardrails (TDD, review gates, controlled handoff) into one unified workflow.

## Key Documents
- README.md: Chinese homepage with full usage guide and FAQ
- docs/README_en.md: English documentation
- INSTALL.md: Installation guide for Claude Code and Trae
- docs/state-machine.md: Workflow state machine (exploring -> specifying -> bridging -> approved-for-build -> executing -> closing)
- docs/artifact-contract.md: Artifact mapping from planning to execution contract
- CHANGELOG.md: Version history
- CONTRIBUTING.md: Contribution guidelines

## Core Skills (in skills/)
- workflow-orchestrator: Entry point, inspects state and routes to correct skill
- spec-explorer: Clarifies intent, scope, constraints, and success criteria
- spec-forger: Generates proposal, specs, design, and tasks
- bridge-contract: Converts planning artifacts into execution-contract.md
- execution-governor: Enforces TDD, review gates, and contract-first implementation
- closure-archivist: Verifies, summarizes, and prepares for archive

## Templates (in templates/)
- proposal.md: Change proposal template
- spec.md: Capability specification template
- design.md: Technical design template
- tasks.md: Implementation tasks template
- execution-contract.md: Bridge artifact template

## Examples (in docs/examples/)
- add-dark-mode: New UI feature example (dark mode)
- refactor-auth-boundary: Brownfield backend refactor example (auth layer)

## Installation
Copy the six skill directories from skills/ to ~/.claude/skills/ or ~/.trae/skills/. See INSTALL.md for details.

## Usage
Start from workflow-orchestrator. The workflow inspects current artifacts and routes to the correct stage automatically.
